S-E-S-0101.title: Missing Python Package
S-E-S-0101.description: The pipeline requires '{detail}' which is not installed in the current environment.
S-E-S-0101.hint:
Run: pip install {detail}
Or activate the correct conda environment: conda activate dcc

S-E-S-0102.title: Wrong Python Version
S-E-S-0102.description: Python 3.10 or higher is required. Current version: {detail}
S-E-S-0102.hint:
Upgrade Python or activate the correct conda environment:
  conda activate dcc
  python --version

S-E-S-0103.title: Environment Test Failed
S-E-S-0103.description: The pipeline environment check did not pass: {detail}
S-E-S-0103.hint:
Check the output above for missing packages.
Run: pip install -r requirements.txt
Or: conda activate dcc

S-E-S-0104.title: Engine Import Error
S-E-S-0104.description: A required engine module failed to import: {detail}
S-E-S-0104.hint:
Check that all engine packages are installed and sys.path includes the workflow/ folder.
Run with --verbose trace for the full traceback.

S-F-S-0201.title: Input File Not Found
S-F-S-0201.description: Cannot find the input file at: {detail}
S-F-S-0201.hint:
Check that the file exists and the path is correct.
If using a relative path, run the pipeline from the dcc/ folder.
Check upload_file_name in config or pass --input on the CLI.

S-F-S-0202.title: Input File Unreadable
S-F-S-0202.description: The input file exists but cannot be opened: {detail}
S-F-S-0202.hint:
Close the file if it is open in Excel.
Check the file is a valid .xlsx file and is not corrupt.
Check you have read permission on the file.

S-F-S-0203.title: Output Directory Not Writable
S-F-S-0203.description: Cannot create or write to the output directory: {detail}
S-F-S-0203.hint:
Check folder permissions.
Ensure the output path is not read-only.
Try running as administrator or changing the output path.

S-F-S-0204.title: Schema File Not Found
S-F-S-0204.description: Cannot find the schema file at: {detail}
S-F-S-0204.hint:
Check that dcc_register_config.json exists in dcc/config/schemas/.
Check schema_register_file in project_config.json.
Run project setup to regenerate missing schema files.

S-F-S-0205.title: Config File Not Found
S-F-S-0205.description: A required configuration file is missing: {detail}
S-F-S-0205.hint:
Check that all files in dcc/config/schemas/ are present.
Run project setup or restore from backup.

S-C-S-0301.title: Invalid Parameter
S-C-S-0301.description: A required parameter is missing, wrong type, or out of range: {detail}
S-C-S-0301.hint:
Check CLI arguments and schema parameter defaults.
Run with --verbose trace to see all resolved parameters.

S-C-S-0302.title: Schema Parse Error
S-C-S-0302.description: A schema JSON file exists but cannot be parsed (malformed JSON): {detail}
S-C-S-0302.hint:
Validate the JSON syntax in the schema file.
Use a JSON validator or run: python -m json.tool <file>

S-C-S-0303.title: Schema Validation Failed
S-C-S-0303.description: The schema loaded but failed structural validation: {detail}
S-C-S-0303.hint:
Check dcc/output/schema_validation_status.json for details.
Ensure all required columns and references are present in dcc_register_config.json.

S-C-S-0304.title: Missing Required Config Key
S-C-S-0304.description: A required configuration key is absent from the resolved parameters: {detail}
S-C-S-0304.hint:
Check dcc_register_config.json for the missing key.
Run with --verbose trace to see all resolved parameters.

S-C-S-0305.title: Project Setup Failed
S-C-S-0305.description: Project setup validation did not pass: {detail}
S-C-S-0305.hint:
Check that all required folders and files exist under the base path.
Expected structure is defined in dcc/config/schemas/project_config.json.
Run with --verbose debug to see which folders or files are missing.

S-R-S-0401.title: Initiation Step Exception
S-R-S-0401.hint:
Run with --verbose trace for the full Python traceback.
Check dcc/output/debug_log.json for captured context.

S-R-S-0404.title: Schema Step Exception
S-R-S-0404.hint:
Run with --verbose trace for the full Python traceback.
Check dcc/output/debug_log.json for captured context.

S-R-S-0405.title: Mapping Step Exception
S-R-S-0405.hint:
Run with --verbose trace for the full Python traceback.
Check dcc/output/debug_log.json for captured context.

S-R-S-0406.title: Processing Step Exception
S-R-S-0406.hint:
Run with --verbose trace for the full Python traceback.
Check dcc/output/debug_log.json for captured context.

S-R-S-0402.title: Fail-Fast Triggered
S-R-S-0402.description: A critical data error stopped the pipeline: {detail}
S-R-S-0402.hint:
Check the Validation_Errors column in the partial output file.
Fix the critical data errors in the source Excel file and re-run.

S-R-S-0403.title: Memory Error
S-R-S-0403.description: The pipeline ran out of memory: {detail}
S-R-S-0403.hint:
Reduce the dataset size using --nrows <number> to process a subset.
Close other applications to free memory.
Consider increasing system RAM.

S-A-S-0501.title: AI Ops Failed
S-A-S-0501.description: The AI operations step encountered an error: {detail}
S-A-S-0501.hint:
AI analysis is optional — the pipeline result is unaffected.
Run with --verbose debug for more detail.
Check that Ollama is running if AI analysis is required.

S-A-S-0502.title: DuckDB Unavailable
S-A-S-0502.description: DuckDB is not installed or the database file is locked: {detail}
S-A-S-0502.hint:
Install DuckDB: pip install duckdb
Or delete the locked file: dcc/output/dcc_runs.duckdb
AI run history will not be saved but the pipeline will complete.

S-A-S-0503.title: Ollama Unavailable
S-A-S-0503.description: The Ollama service is not running or unreachable: {detail}
S-A-S-0503.hint:
Start Ollama: ollama serve
Or ignore — the rule-based fallback provider will be used automatically.
